programs.title: By truck across the United States
programs.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity to combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programs.title: Ghosts Of Morgan City
programs.desc: After a sudden increase in alarm calls in Morgan City, the city's mayor and police chief recruit a team of paranormal experts to investigate supernatural activity.

actor: Teen victim of yellow fever - Sophia Sluyter

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc:
Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity
In Zanzibar, Martyna Wojciechowska visits two women who share a husband.This country is a stronghold of radical Islam.According to the Quran, a man has the right to polygamy, but he must provide a decent living for all his spouses and divide his time fairly between them.Wache Musa, 25, has been married since she was fifteen.She has four children and works as a cleaner in a private house.The younger Mariam has been married for half a year and has a three-month-old child.He performs tedious work on a plantation of algae intended for food and the production of beauty masks.
